key.name: ollama-host
key.description: Base URL of the Ollama server. May point at a dedicated LAN AI box, e.g. http://192.168.1.10:11434

key.name: default-model
key.description: Model used by AI spells and the chat. Empty until the user picks one from the configured host.

key.name: max-history-items
key.description: How many clipboard entries to keep.

key.name: translate-primary-language
key.description: The user's primary language. Quick Translation translates into this language when the input is in neither pair language.

key.name: translate-secondary-language
key.description: The other half of the Quick Translation language pair. Translation is bidirectional between the primary and secondary languages.

key.name: chat-x
key.description: Saved horizontal position of the chat window. -1 means centered (first open).

key.name: chat-y
key.description: Saved vertical position of the chat window. -1 means centered (first open).

key.name: chat-width
key.description: Saved width of the chat window, in pixels.

key.name: chat-height
key.description: Saved height of the chat window, in pixels.
